[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000001 1
1 00000000 a
2 00001100 2
3 00010100 2
4 00111100 4
5 11100110 5
6 10001111 5
7 01100001 3

01 10 00001000 1
12 21 00000100 1
23 32 00010100 2 match 3
34 43 00100100 2
45 54 10000110 3
56 65 00000001 1 match 0
67 76 00100001 2
70 07 10000000 1

24 42 00000100 1

71 17 00000000 a match 1

47 74 10100000 2
50 05 10001010 3
61 16 00000000 a match 1
72 27 00000001 1 match 0

37 73 00100000 1
